hero.description: Crafting digital experiences that bridge the gap between user needs and business goals.

profile.name: Devesh Kumar
profile.title: UI/UX Designer
profile.location: B-52, Lagerstromia Estate Chi 4, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh
profile.objective: Aspiring to leverage design skills and an innovative mindset to drive creative solutions in the field of Design.

education.degree: B.tech in Computer Science and Engineering

details: Designed end-to-end user interfaces and interactive wireframes for modern web applications.
Collaborated with product teams to build visual hierarchies and interactive animations.
Enhanced design consistency by creating and maintaining scalable Figma design systems.
Created high-impact social media posters, logos and videos for the companies.
By creatively content with stunning visuals, boosted engagement & brand awareness.
Integrated graphic design skills with specific components to create innovative visual posts.
Applied graphic design principles to develop user-friendly interfaces.
Designed eye catching magazine covers, interactive social media posts, and event logos.
Used design fundamentals to create visually appropriate media on different working disciplines.
Demonstrated expertise in visual branding and digital communication.
By creating impactful logos, dynamic poster designs, and engaging website pages.

projects.title: Smart Home Integration Web Application
projects.description: Crafted an intuitive, user-centered interface for planning smart home interior. Designed interactive elements with smooth transitions and animations, enhancing user engagement and providing clear visual feedback for actions.
projects.longDescription: This application allows homeowners to plan and preview their smart device configurations interactively. Built to show real-time transitions and mock home environments, creating a highly visual and responsive utility dashboard for modern living room and kitchen layouts.

projects.title: Quantum Bank Mobile App
projects.description: Designed a modern mobile banking experience focused on asset tracking, smooth transfers, and glassmorphic UI cards.
projects.longDescription: A mobile interface for the tech-savvy generation. Focuses on minimal, highly contrast screens that make reading numbers and statistics quick. Features custom charts, multi-currency wallets, and step-by-step transaction walkthroughs with subtle micro-interactions.

projects.title: GDG Fest Branding & Asset Pack
projects.description: A vibrant series of posters, carousels, and typography assets created for tech events, using color psychology to boost engagement.
projects.longDescription: Developed visual identity templates and event banners. Used custom typography grid guidelines to construct social media carousels and promotional videos, achieving a unified brand presentation for physical and digital banners.

certifications.name: Google Build Wireframes and Low-Fidelity Prototypes

achievements: Got second prize in the Logo Competition
Certificates: World Environment Summit, Smart India Hackathon, Dexterix, Unifest, Cyber Knight, SAY NO TO PICSART Workshop, MotoGP Bharat, Cinemastro, Designathon, Picture Abhi Baki Hai
extracurriculars: Attended a Google Developer Group Fest
Former Club Head of Graphex Club (Student Council) of Galgotias University

questions.question: Are you available for freelance or contract design work?
questions.answer: Yes, I am open to freelance and contract opportunities.

questions.question: What industries do you specialize in?
questions.answer: I have experience in various industries including tech, e-commerce, and healthcare.

questions.question: What design tools do you use in your workflow?
questions.answer: I primarily use Figma, Adobe XD, and Illustrator.
